descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Choose 1 card from the Draw Pile and add it to your hand. If it's a {Critical Hit}, the selected card's Arithmetica Cost -1.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Choose 1 card from the Draw Pile and place it into hand. If it's a {Critical Hit}, reduce the chosen card's Arithmetica Cost by 2.
